scripts.build: pnpm --filter @llmcraft/shared build && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/server build && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @llmcraft/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/client typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/server test && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/server build && pnpm --filter @llmcraft/client build
